candidates.why: The selected COGS row is 'Cost of goods sold ex depreciation', which explicitly excludes depreciation. A separate operating 'Depreciation' line appears above financial items and reconciles the ex-depreciation COGS toward total COGS, so it should be added separately to the COGS bucket.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold ex depreciation
candidates.why: This is the already selected parent COGS row, not a D&A row to add separately.
This is clearly tied to SGA, not COGS.

variables.notes: Manually Removed. Because the chosen COGS reference bucket is explicitly ex-depreciation, the separate operating 'Depreciation' row should be added to capture COGS-related D&A. No more specific COGS-only D&A summary is shown.

candidates.why: Although this is the relevant SGA D&A line, it appears to be a component of the selected 'Operating expenses' parent total (e.g., Operating expenses = Administrative/General Expenses - Balancing value + Depreciation/Amortization in SGA in years shown). Since XSGA_COMPONENTS already includes 'Operating expenses', adding this separately would risk double counting.
This appears tied to COGS/gross profit presentation rather than SG&A specifically.

variables.notes: Do not add separate SGA D&A because 'Depreciation/Amortization in SGA' appears embedded within the already selected XSGA reference bucket via the selected parent row 'Operating expenses'. Conservative choice avoids double counting.
